tasks.subject: Task 1: mediaSession.ts 모듈
tasks.description:
**Goal:** navigator.mediaSession을 다루는 순수·테스트 가능한 모듈(룬 스토어 무관, 콜백/상태만 받음).

**Files:**
- Create: app/src/lib/music/mediaSession.ts
- Test: app/tests/unit/music/mediaSession.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** buildMetadataInit 매핑 / syncMediaSession playbackState+diff+positionState guard / installMediaSession 핸들러+uninstall / 미지원 no-op.

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/mediaSession.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/music/mediaSession.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/mediaSession.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/mediaSession.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["buildMetadataInit maps fields", "syncMediaSession playbackState playing/paused/none", "metadata rebuilt only on key change", "positionState skipped when duration<=0 and clamped when valid", "installMediaSession wires + uninstall clears handlers", "no-op when mediaSession unsupported"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: musicPlayer.pause() 추가
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 인덱스를 바꾸지 않고 재생만 멈추는 pause()를 스토어에 추가.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/lib/music/musicPlayer.svelte.ts
- Test: app/tests/unit/music/musicPlayer.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** pause()가 isPlaying=false, currentIndex 보존.

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/musicPlayer.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/music/musicPlayer.svelte.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/musicPlayer.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/musicPlayer.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pause() sets isPlaying false and keeps currentIndex"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: MusicPlayerBar 배선 (프리로드 + Media Session)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 프리로드용 숨김 <audio> + Media Session 배선 $effect 3개(preload/install/sync).

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/lib/editor/musicNote/MusicPlayerBar.svelte
- Test: app/tests/unit/music/MusicPlayerBar.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** 마운트+play(0)→metadata(title a/artist 길/album 드라이브)+playbackState playing / 두 번째 audio가 다음 곡 데움, 마지막 곡 빈 값 / render 루프 없음+기존 자동넘김 통과.

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/MusicPlayerBar.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/musicNote/MusicPlayerBar.svelte", "app/tests/unit/music/MusicPlayerBar.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/MusicPlayerBar.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lock-screen metadata reflects current track (title a/artist 길/album 드라이브) and playbackState playing", "second audio preloads next track url, empty on last track", "render mounts without effect loop and existing auto-advance test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: 가이드 문서 (env 탭 카드)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 설정→가이드→환경/호환성 env 탭에 백그라운드 재생 guide-card 추가(CLAUDE.md 필수).

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte

**Acceptance Criteria:** env 탭 guide-card 추가(PWA 설치 권장+iOS 미보장+Android 정상+오프라인 미지원) / npm run check 0 errors.

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["env guide tab has background-playback guide-card", "card covers PWA install + iOS caveat + Android + no-offline", "npm run check 0 errors"]}
```
